title: Titleist TSi3 Driver
description: 2021 model, 9° loft, Tensei AV Blue shaft stiff flex. Barely used, original headcover included. No scratches.

title: Callaway Apex Iron Set (4-PW)
description: Full set of 7 irons with True Temper steel shafts, regular flex. Light bag wear on soles, grooves in great condition.

title: TaylorMade Spider EX Putter
description: 34 inch, right hand. Pure white finish with red accents. SuperStroke grip, alignment aids intact.

title: Ping G425 Fairway Wood (3W)
description: 15° loft, Alta CB Slate shaft regular flex. Adjustable hosel, all settings available. Headcover included.

title: Titleist Vokey SM9 Wedge Set
description: 52°, 56° and 60° set. Brushed steel finish, Dynamic Gold shafts. Moderate use, grooves still sharp.

title: Sun Mountain C-130 Cart Bag
description: 14-way divider, cart-friendly base, multiple pockets. Dark navy with grey trim. All zips fully functional.
